description.zh: 面板管理工作台 · 四个区:工作台启用 / 排序、多模态模型绑定、cli-provider 认证健康、marketplace 插件计数;与 Studio 设置面板(SettingsPanel)的 sections 同源。
description.en: Admin workbench — four sections: workbench enable/order, multi-modal model bindings, cli-provider auth health, and marketplace plugin counts; kept in sync with Studio's SettingsPanel sections.
